# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

def main():
    import sys
    sys.setrecursionlimit(1000000)
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    N = int(sys.stdin.readline())

    length = len(S)
    max_val = 0
    found = False

    def backtrack(pos, current_val, has_question):
        nonlocal max_val, found
        if pos == length:
            if current_val <= N:
                if current_val > max_val:
                    max_val = current_val
                    found = True
            return

        bit = S[pos]
        if bit == '?':
            # Try 0
            backtrack(pos + 1, current_val << 1, has_question or True)
            # Try 1
            backtrack(pos + 1, (current_val << 1) | 1, has_question or True)
        else:
            # Try the fixed bit
            new_val = (current_val << 1) | int(bit)
            backtrack(pos + 1, new_val, has_question)

    backtrack(0, 0, False)

    print(max_val if found else -1)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
